experiment_title: 碳酸钠/碳酸氢钠与稀盐酸反应生成二氧化碳的验证实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="碳酸钠/碳酸氢钠与稀盐酸反应生成二氧化碳的验证实验" goal="验证碳酸钠和碳酸氢钠与稀盐酸反应均能产生二氧化碳气体，并通过澄清石灰水检验气体性质" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_na2co3" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_nahco3" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_limewater" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="rubber_stopper_tube" type="rubber_stopper_with_tube" />
      <Component id="test_tube_stand" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Na2CO3" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="NaHCO3" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="dil_HCl" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="limewater" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_na2co3" reagent="Na2CO3" mass="1 g" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_na2co3" support="test_tube_stand" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_limewater" reagent="Ca(OH)2" volume="5 mL" id="step_2" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_limewater" support="test_tube_stand" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_na2co3" reagent="HCl" volume="2 mL" id="step_4" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stopper_tube" vessel="test_tube_na2co3" id="step_5" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stopper_tube" vessel="test_tube_limewater" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_7" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 组装碳酸钠发生装置并装药，准备好检验气体的石灰水装置。
向碳酸钠试管中加入稀盐酸，立即用带导管的橡皮塞密封，连接至盛有澄清石灰水的试管。
等待反应进行，观察石灰水变化，检验生成气体的性质。
